ABOUT.TITLE: About me
ABOUT.P1: I'm a Full Stack developer passionate about creating digital solutions that make a difference. With experience in Angular and .NET, I always strive to deliver clean code and high-quality applications.
ABOUT.P2: My programming journey started with the curiosity to understand how things work. Today, that curiosity has become a career where I can solve real problems through technology.
ABOUT.P3: I'm always looking for new challenges and opportunities to learn and grow as a professional.
